title: Guatemala Application for Registration of Mercantile Companies before SAT and the Mercantile Registry (Form SAT-RM-02)
description: Registro Mercantil General de la República's and the Superintendencia de Administración Tributaria (SAT)'s joint live, unauthenticated web form "SOLICITUD DE INSCRIPCIÓN DE SOCIEDADES MERCANTILES ANTE LA SUPERINTENDENCIA DE ADMINISTRACIÓN TRIBUTARIA Y EL REGISTRO MERCANTIL" (Form SAT-RM-02), served directly and unauthenticated at servicios.registromercantil.gob.gt as part of the free "ePortal" online-filing channel. Opens Guatemala as the registry's 93rd jurisdiction. Models a single mercantile company's (sociedad mercantil, e.g. sociedad anónima) combined registration before the Mercantile Registry, its first mercantile business establishment (empresa mercantil), SAT taxpayer registration (IVA/ISR regime elections), and initial accounting-books authorization — all filed together on this one form, per this jurisdiction's own "single window" registration design. This schema does not submit the application itself; the live source and the Registro Mercantil General de la República's and SAT's own current requirements are always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Guatemala or its Registro Mercantil General de la República or Superintendencia de Administración Tributaria.

authority.name: Registro Mercantil General de la República

source.documentRef: SOLICITUD DE INSCRIPCIÓN DE SOCIEDADES MERCANTILES ANTE LA SUPERINTENDENCIA DE ADMINISTRACIÓN TRIBUTARIA Y EL REGISTRO MERCANTIL, Form SAT-RM-02, Registro Mercantil General de la República / SAT, live server-rendered HTML form (not a static PDF/DOCX).

verification.notes: See VERIFICATION.md for the full write-up: source fetch/HTML structure, the four genuinely mutually-exclusive discriminator pairs identified via the page's own client-side JS (vs. the many non-exclusive checkbox groups left as independent booleans), the global book-medium discriminator, the bounded-slot additional-books convention, and every disclosed scoping/judgment call.

steps.title: Section II — Company Particulars and Capital (Items 15-30)
Section II — Administration, Oversight, and Legal Representation Bodies (Items 31-33)
Section II — Authorizing Notary and Complementary Deed (Items 34-43)
Section V — Accountant and Tax Registration (Items 61-73)

fields.name: applicantMarriedSurname
fields.label: Apellido de Casada (Opcional)
fields.description: Explicitly marked "(OPCIONAL)" on the form itself.

fields.name: applicantIdentificationType
fields.label: Documento de Identificación
fields.description: The form's own "opcion_documento()" script disables the sibling checkbox and its number field once one of PASAPORTE / DOCUMENTO PERSONAL DE IDENTIFICACION (DPI) is checked — a genuine mutually exclusive pair, modelled as an explicit discriminator per this registry's established convention (e.g. tt/rgd/partnership-beneficial-ownership-statement's declarantCategory).
fields.sourceRef: Item 9 — "DOCUMENTO DE IDENTIFICACIÓN" — "PASAPORTE" / "DOCUMENTO PERSONAL DE IDENTIFICACION (DPI)" checkboxes

fields.name: applicantPassportNumber
fields.label: Número de Pasaporte
fields.sourceRef: Item 9, revealed input — placeholder "ingrese su pasaporte"

fields.name: applicantDpiNumber
fields.label: Número de DPI
fields.sourceRef: Item 9, revealed input — placeholder "ingrese su dpi"

fields.name: applicantCapacity
fields.label: Calidad en que Actúa
fields.description: The form's own "opcion_actua()" script disables the two sibling checkboxes once one of NOTARIO / REPRESENTANTE LEGAL / SOCIO is checked — a genuine mutually exclusive triplet, modelled as an explicit discriminator.
fields.sourceRef: Item 11 — "CALIDAD EN EL QUE ACTUA" — "NOTARIO" / "REPRESENTANTE LEGAL" / "SOCIO" checkboxes

fields.name: companyDuration
fields.label: Plazo
fields.description: Free-text duration (e.g. a number of years or "INDEFINIDO"), per the field's own 15-character limit — too short for a full sentence but not constrained to a numeric-only pattern by the source.

fields.name: companyPurpose
fields.label: Objeto de la Sociedad
fields.sourceRef: Item 23 — "OBJETO DE LA SOCIEDAD" (free-text area, 2000-character limit)

fields.name: authorizedCapital
fields.label: Capital Autorizado
fields.description: Amount in Guatemalan Quetzales (GTQ), the jurisdiction's currency — the form prints no explicit currency-unit label alongside this field.

fields.name: shareNominalValue
fields.label: Valor Nominal de las Acciones
fields.description: Amount in Guatemalan Quetzales (GTQ), per the same currency convention as authorizedCapital.

fields.name: incorporationDeedNumber
fields.label: Número de Escritura Pública de Constitución
fields.sourceRef: Item 29 — "NÚMERO DE ESCRITURA PÚBLICA DE CONSTITUCIÓN"

fields.name: incorporationDeedPlace
fields.label: Lugar de Escritura Pública de Constitución
fields.sourceRef: Item 30 — "LUGAR Y FECHA DE ESCRITURA PÚBLICA DE CONSTITUCIÓN", place component

fields.name: incorporationDeedDate
fields.label: Fecha de Escritura Pública de Constitución
fields.sourceRef: Item 30 — "LUGAR Y FECHA DE ESCRITURA PÚBLICA DE CONSTITUCIÓN", date component

fields.name: administrationBoardOfDirectors
fields.label: Órgano de Administración: Consejo de Administración
fields.description: One of three selectable administration-body options; the source's own "org_administrador()" script does not disable the sibling checkboxes, so no mutual exclusivity is enforced by the form itself — modelled as an independent boolean, not a forced enum, per this registry's convention of matching only the exclusivity the source itself enforces (contrast applicantIdentificationType/applicantCapacity above, whose sibling checkboxes the source does disable).

fields.name: legalRepresentationBoardMembers
fields.label: Cargos con Representación Legal: Miembro(s) del Consejo de Administración
fields.sourceRef: Item 33 — "CARGOS CON REPRESENTACIÓN LEGAL" — "MIEMBRO(S) DEL CONSEJO DE ADMINISTRACIÓN"

fields.name: legalRepresentationSoleAdministrator
fields.label: Cargos con Representación Legal: Administrador Único

fields.name: notaryName
fields.label: Nombre del Notario
fields.description: The notary who authorized the public incorporation deed cited in incorporationDeedNumber — every Guatemalan mercantile company must be constituted by public deed before a notary, distinct from the applicant themselves (who per applicantCapacity may be the notary, the legal representative, or a partner).

fields.name: notaryBarNumber
fields.label: Número de Colegiado
fields.description: The notary's bar/professional-association (Colegio de Abogados y Notarios) registration number.

fields.name: complementaryDeedNumber
fields.label: Número de Escritura Complementaria
fields.description: A complementary/amending deed only exists where the incorporation deed was later amended or complemented before registration; modelled optional since not every filing has one.

fields.name: complementaryDeedPlace
fields.label: Lugar de Escritura Complementaria
fields.sourceRef: Item 41 — "LUGAR Y FECHA DE ESCRITURA COMPLEMENTARIA", place component

fields.name: complementaryDeedDate
fields.label: Fecha de Escritura Complementaria
fields.sourceRef: Item 41 — "LUGAR Y FECHA DE ESCRITURA COMPLEMENTARIA", date component

fields.name: complementaryDeedNotaryName
fields.label: Nombre de Notario Autorizante
fields.description: The form itself mislabels this item "43" (the same numeral immediately reused for "NOMBRE DEL REPRESENTANTE LEGAL" at the start of Section III below) — a genuine printed-numbering skip/duplication (item 42 is never printed), disclosed here rather than silently corrected.
fields.sourceRef: Item 43 [sic, duplicate numeral — see description] — "NOMBRE DE NOTARIO AUTORIZANTE"

fields.name: representativeIdentificationType
fields.label: Documento de Identificación
fields.description: The form's own "identificacion_representante()" script disables the sibling checkbox once one of PASAPORTE / DPI is checked, the same mutually-exclusive pattern as applicantIdentificationType above.
fields.sourceRef: Item 46 — "DOCUMENTO DE IDENTIFICACIÓN" — "PASAPORTE" / "DOCUMENTO PERSONAL DE IDENTIFICACIÓN (DPI)" checkboxes

fields.name: representativeTitle
fields.label: Cargo del Representante Legal
fields.description: Free text, e.g. "Gerente General" or "Administrador Único" — the source prints a free-text box here rather than a checkbox tied to the Item 33 "Cargos con Representación Legal" selections.

fields.name: representativeAppointmentDate
fields.label: Fecha del Acta Notarial del Nombramiento
fields.sourceRef: Item 51 — "FECHA DEL ACTA NOTARIAL DEL NOMBRAMIENTO"

fields.name: establishmentEmail
fields.label: Dirección de Correo Electrónico (Opcional)
fields.description: Explicitly marked "(OPCIONAL)" on the form itself.

fields.name: establishmentCapital
fields.label: Capital
fields.description: Amount in Guatemalan Quetzales (GTQ), per the same currency convention as authorizedCapital.

fields.name: establishmentPurpose
fields.label: Objeto de la Empresa
fields.sourceRef: Item 60 — "OBJETO DE LA EMPRESA" (free-text area, 2000-character limit)

fields.name: ivaSmallTaxpayerAnnualAmount
fields.label: Régimen Pequeño Contribuyente: Monto Anual
fields.description: The form prints no checkbox selecting between the Pequeño Contribuyente and Regimen General IVA tracks — the applicant's choice of tax regime is implied by which of this field and ivaGeneralRegimeEstimatedAnnualIncome is populated, not by an explicit selector field. Amount in Guatemalan Quetzales (GTQ).

fields.name: ivaGeneralRegimeEstimatedAnnualIncome
fields.label: Régimen General: Ingresos Anuales Estimados
fields.description: See ivaSmallTaxpayerAnnualAmount — the same undiscriminated either/or pair. Amount in Guatemalan Quetzales (GTQ).

fields.name: isrProfitRegimeLucrativeActivities
fields.label: ISR: Régimen Sobre las Utilidades de Actividades Lucrativas
fields.sourceRef: Item 66 — "RÉGIMEN SOBRE LAS UTILIDADES DE ACTIVIDADES LUCRATIVAS"

fields.name: isrCalculationMethodTaxableIncome
fields.label: Forma de Cálculo: A) Renta Imponible x 25%
fields.description: One of two selectable calculation-method checkboxes under Item 66's regime; the source's own "impuesto_s_renta()" script does not enforce mutual exclusivity between them (unlike the identification-type/capacity pairs above), so both are modelled as independent booleans rather than a forced enum.

fields.name: isrCalculationMethodGrossIncome
fields.label: Forma de Cálculo: B) Renta Bruta x 8%
fields.description: Excludes rentas externas y ganancias de capital, per the form's own parenthetical note.
fields.sourceRef: Item 67 — "B) RENTA BRUTA X 8% X25% (EXCLUIR RENTAS EXTERNAS Y GANANCIAS DE CAPITAL)"

fields.name: isrSimplifiedOptionalRegime
fields.label: ISR: Régimen Opcional Simplificado Sobre Ingresos de Actividades Lucrativas
fields.sourceRef: Item 68 — "RÉGIMEN OPCIONAL SIMPLIFICADO SOBRE INGRESOS DE ACTIVIDADES LUCRATIVAS"

fields.name: inventoryValuationFifo
fields.label: Sistema de Valuación de Inventarios: PEPS (Primero en Entrar, Primero en Salir)
fields.description: One of five selectable inventory-valuation-system checkboxes; not enforced mutually exclusive by the source's own script (same "impuesto_s_renta()" handler as the ISR calculation-method pair above), modelled as independent booleans.
fields.sourceRef: Item 70 — "SISTEMA VALUACIÓN DE INVENTARIOS" — "A) PRIMERO EN ENTRAR PRIMERO EN SALIR (PEPS)"

fields.name: inventoryValuationWeightedAverage
fields.label: Sistema de Valuación de Inventarios: Promedio Ponderado

fields.name: inventoryValuationHistoricalPrice
fields.label: Sistema de Valuación de Inventarios: Precio Histórico del Bien

fields.name: inventoryValuationProductionCost
fields.label: Sistema de Valuación de Inventarios: Costo de Producción

fields.name: inventoryValuationEstimatedCost
fields.label: Sistema de Valuación de Inventarios: Costo Estimado o Precio Fijo
fields.sourceRef: Item 70 — "E) COSTO ESTIMADO O PRECIO FIJO"

fields.name: accountingSystemAccrual
fields.label: Sistema Contable: Devengado
fields.description: Not enforced mutually exclusive with accountingSystemCash by the source's own script; modelled as an independent boolean, same as the inventory-valuation and ISR-calculation-method pairs above.

fields.name: vehicleCirculationTaxRegistration
fields.label: Sobre Circulación de Vehículos
fields.description: The source prints a free-text box under "OTROS IMPUESTOS" with no further label detail distinguishing whether this records a vehicle identifier, an estimated tax amount, or a simple yes/no notation — modelled as a free-text string per this registry's "don't invent structure the source doesn't show" practice.

fields.name: isrCreditableToIso
fields.label: Impuesto de Solidaridad: ISR Acreditable a ISO
fields.sourceRef: Item 73 — "IMPUESTO DE SOLIDARIDAD" — "ISR ACREDITABLE A ISO"

fields.name: isoCreditableToIsr
fields.label: Impuesto de Solidaridad: ISO Acreditable a ISR

fields.name: bookMedium
fields.label: Habilitación de Libros: Electrónicos o Físicos
fields.description: The source's own "fisico_elcectronico()" script gates this as a single global choice: checking "Electrónicos" on the first (INVENTARIO) row disables "Físicos" on that row and enables the "Electrónicos" checkbox for every other book row (and vice-versa) — i.e. one medium applies uniformly to every book listed in this section, not a per-book choice. Modelled as a single discriminator rather than 22 individual per-row checkboxes.
fields.sourceRef: Item 74 table — "Electrónicos" / "Fisicos" column headers and their cross-row enable/disable script

fields.name: book1PageCount
fields.label: Número de Hojas: Libro de Inventarios
fields.description: Guatemala's Commercial Code (Código de Comercio, Decreto 2-70, Art. 368) requires every merchant to maintain an Inventory book; this row's book name ("INVENTARIO") is fixed/read-only on the source, so only the requested page count is modelled as applicant-supplied data.
fields.sourceRef: Item 74 table, row 1 — "Nombre Del Libro" = "INVENTARIO" (read-only), "No. De Hojas"

fields.name: book2PageCount
fields.label: Número de Hojas: Libro Diario
fields.description: The statutorily required Diario (Journal) book; see book1PageCount.
fields.sourceRef: Item 74 table, row 2 — "Nombre Del Libro" = "DIARIO" (read-only), "No. De Hojas"

fields.name: book3PageCount
fields.label: Número de Hojas: Libro Mayor
fields.description: The statutorily required Mayor (General Ledger) book; see book1PageCount.
fields.sourceRef: Item 74 table, row 3 — "Nombre Del Libro" = "MAYOR" (read-only), "No. De Hojas"

fields.name: book4PageCount
fields.label: Número de Hojas: Libro de Estados Financieros
fields.description: The statutorily required Estados Financieros (Financial Statements) book; see book1PageCount.
fields.sourceRef: Item 74 table, row 4 — "Nombre Del Libro" = "ESTADOS FINANCIEROS" (read-only), "No. De Hojas"

fields.name: additionalBook1Name
fields.label: Libro Adicional 1: Nombre
fields.description: The source offers up to 7 further blank/editable book-name rows beyond the four statutorily fixed books above (expandable via an on-page "+" control, capped at 11 total rows), with no printed count field or checkbox gating how many will be used — modelled as bounded optional slots per this registry's established bounded-repeating-group convention (e.g. mu/cbrd/limited-partnership-registration's generalPartner1..7 slots).

fields.name: signatureOfApplicant
fields.label: Firma
fields.description: Modelled directly as a single signature value, the same convention this registry applies to other legal-document signature lines with no distinct AcroForm field.
fields.sourceRef: Signature line — "Firma", beneath the sworn-declaration paragraph (Arts. 459/460 Código Penal; Ley para la Simplificación de Requisitos y Trámites Administrativos, Art. 13)
